function.name: code_sandbox
function.description: Run a python3 or bash script in a sandboxed environment without network access. Both standard output and error streams are returned. Installed python3 packages are: annotated-types,attrs,beautifulsoup4,certifi,charset-normalizer,click,contourpy,cycler,et_xmlfile,fonttools,idna,joblib,jsonschema,jsonschema-specifications,kiwisolver,lightgbm,lxml,matplotlib,more-itertools,mpmath,narwhals,nltk,numpy,nvidia-nccl-cu12,openpyxl,packaging,pandas,patsy,pillow,plotly,pyarrow,pydantic,pydantic_core,pyparsing,python-dateutil,pytz,PyYAML,RapidFuzz,referencing,regex,requests,rpds-py,scikit-learn,scipy,seaborn,six,soupsieve,statsmodels,sympy,tabulate,threadpoolctl,toml,tqdm,typing-inspection,typing_extensions,urllib3,xgboost,xlrd. Unix tools available are: grep,sed,awk,sort,uniq,cut,tr,wc,head,tail,find,diff,cat,jq,sqlite3.

cmd.description: The command to be executed, which should not be escaped in any way; write exactly as you would at a terminal.
